# PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode

**Enumeration**

Options for delivering requested video data, used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHVideoRequestOptions/deliveryMode] property.

## Declaration

```swift
enum PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode
```

## Constants

- **PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode.automatic**: Photos automatically determines which quality of video data to provide based on the request and current conditions.
- **PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode.highQualityFormat**: Photos provides only the highest quality video available.
- **PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode.mediumQualityFormat**: Photos provides a video of moderate quality unless a higher quality version is locally cached.
- **PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode.fastFormat**: Photos provides whatever quality of video can be most quickly loaded.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Specifying Video Request Options

- **version**: The version of the video to request.
- **PHVideoRequestOptionsVersion**: Options for requesting a video asset with or without adjustments, used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHVideoRequestOptions/version] property.
- **deliveryMode**: A mode specifying the requested video quality and delivery priority.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
